Classes are activities done by the [[Church of Evolution]] to help [[Evolutionists]] learn

Classes are used to teach both spiritual and secular knowledge. 

They are structured to prevent [[educational tripping]]

[[Category:The Pride]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
